Ad Text:
About the Opportunity

We are currently partnering with a Queensland State Government department to recruit an experienced Change Analyst to support a large-scale transformation and reform program.

This role sits within a central Transformation Office and plays a key part in driving and embedding change across complex organisational initiatives.
Key Responsibilities

Deliver end-to-end change management activities across multiple projects
Develop and execute stakeholder engagement and communication strategies
Support transition planning and integration into business-as-usual operations
Collaborate with project teams, business units, and leadership to embed change
Monitor change adoption, risks, and provide insights to senior stakeholders
About You

Proven experience in change management within large, complex environments
Strong stakeholder engagement and influencing skills
Experience delivering change across transformation or reform programs
Solid understanding of change frameworks and methodologies
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
What’s on Offer

$99.10 + super per hour
Brisbane CBD location & WFH options
Contract within a major transformation program
Opportunity to contribute to meaningful public sector reform
Apply Now
If you’re a driven Change Analyst looking to make an impact within a high-profile government program, we’d love to hear from you.

Drive the future of AI‑led IT transformation & strategy consulting
Senior advisory role with practice ownership responsibilities
Shape growth across Australia with Fusion5
At Fusion5, we're more than a solutions provider - we're a Transformation Partner. Across Australia and New Zealand, we help ambitious organisations go beyond by unlocking greater value, innovation and impact from their technology investments.
 
Across business applications, AI, cloud, data, integration and managed services, we bring together connected solutions that solve real business problems and deliver lasting value. We're deeply committed to our customers' success, and we bring that same energy and care to supporting our people.
 
We're now looking for a Practice Lead - Transformation & Strategy to establish and grow a market-leading, AI-first strategy and advisory practice in Australia. This is a senior advisory role with accountability for shaping strategy, building capability and working directly with executive clients to help them navigate complex transformations notably in a fast-changing AI world.
This is a rare opportunity to build something meaningful from the ground up, with the backing of an established, respected brand across Australia and New Zealand.
 
What You'll Do
In this role, you'll lead the creation and growth of Fusion5's Transformation & Strategy practice - scaling it from a founding team into a commercially strong, differentiated advisory business serving the upper mid-market. You'll position Fusion5 as the go-to partner for AI-led transformation, combining deep advisory capability with practical execution and a strong client-first consulting culture. Expect to:

Own the strategy, GTM & build of Fusion5's Transformation line of business in Australia, driving profitable growth, pipeline and utilisation
Act as a trusted executive advisor, personally leading high-impact engagements at C‑suite level
Shape and deliver AI-first transformation strategies, including operating model and agentic enterprise design
Build compelling business cases and AI-led roadmaps that move clients from ambition to action
Convert strategic advisory work into long‑term programmes across the broader Fusion5 portfolio
Represent Fusion5 externally as a thought leader through executive networks, events and industry forums
What You'll Bring
This role is designed for a senior advisory consulting leader who combines commercial rigour with genuine curiosity about what AI makes possible. You're likely to bring:

A proven track record building and scaling strategy or transformation practices, with end‑to‑end ownership
Experience operating in strategy consulting or Big 4-style environments, with a strong advisory mindset and confidence engaging senior stakeholders on complex programmes
Demonstrated success delivering executive‑level strategy and transformation engagements
Strong commercial and sales leadership capability, including pipeline development and deal conversion
Credibility and presence when working with Board and C‑suite stakeholders
AI fluency, including hands‑on use of AI tools, agentic systems and AI‑led methodologies in real, client‑facing work
The ability to translate technology and AI into clear business outcomes and measurable ROI
A genuine appetite to build, mentor and lead high‑performing, AI‑fluent consulting teams
What's in it for you?
"Go Beyond" isn't a marketing line at Fusion5, it's the standard we hold ourselves to. It reflects a convergence of solutions, services, and capabilities that enables clients to realise their business vision, with AI as a strategic lever for transformation.
 
At Fusion5, you'll have the autonomy to shape a practice, the backing of an established trans‑Tasman organisation, and the opportunity to work alongside people who genuinely care about outcomes - not just output. We're proud to be a diverse, inclusive and forward‑thinking employer, and we're committed to creating a workplace where our people feel engaged, challenged, supported and successful. Alongside this, we offer a strong set of values and benefits that reflect how we work and what we stand for.

Collaborative, supportive culture where people enjoy working together
Flexible work arrangements and a genuine focus on work-life balance
Birthday leave, volunteer days, and regular social events
Opportunities for professional growth with clear development plans
If you're motivated to be at the forefront of what comes next - with the freedom to build, the platform to influence, and a clear mandate to put AI at the centre of meaningful transformation - we'd love to hear from you.  Apply Now.
 
Bring your personality to your application. We value the human connection and take the time to read all our CVs - despite how helpful AI can be.
